heading: Use of information for sentencing
label: 3661 Use of information for sentencing
text: No limitation shall be placed on the information concerning the background, character, and conduct of a person convicted of an offense which a court of the United States may receive and consider for the purpose of imposing an appropriate sentence.
notes: Short Title of 1990 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–421, § 1104 Stat. 909Oct. 12, 1990“This Act [amending provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Drug and Alcohol Dependent Offenders Treatment Act of 1989’.”section 3672 of this title
